content:
# Recommendations ‚ÄĒ next plan iter (post iter-102)

## Top priority ‚ÄĒ (c) `trivialisation_restrict_compat` is now the SOLE open sorry
- Keystone (a) `dual_unit_iso_restrict_assemble` is CLOSED (sorry-free, axiom-clean). (c) at L2660 is
  **unblocked in principle** (a/S4a landed). It is the last sorry in `TensorObjInverse.lean` and the
  last sorry in the dual cone.
- **It is a large 5-square telescope** (S2/S3/S4a/S4b/S4c + ŌĀ/uőĻ reindex). Prover's documented blocker:
  each square needs naturality in the immersion `j`, not just `restrictFunctorComp`. Was sorry in v4.30.
- **Action: HARD GATE first.** (c)'s blueprint readiness must be re-confirmed before dispatch ‚ÄĒ check
  `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex` chapter verdict; if the 5-square telescope prose is thin, dispatch a
  blueprint-writer / effort-breaker to atomize the S2..S4c squares + the `j`-naturality requirement
  BEFORE sending a prover. Do NOT send a `prove` lane at a 5-square monolith.

## Coverage debt (dag-query unmatched = 159; +1 new this iter)
- **NEW: `adj_unit_counit_collapse`** (`TensorObjInverse.lean` ~L1657) ‚ÄĒ generic helper, no blueprint
  block. Statement: for `adj : L ‚ä£ R`, `g : L.obj P ‚ü∂ B`,
  `L.map (adj.unit.app P ‚Čę R.map g) ‚Čę adj.counit.app B = g`. Deps: `Adjunction.homEquiv_unit`,
  `Adjunction.homEquiv_counit`, `Equiv.symm_apply_apply` (pure category algebra, Mathlib-adjacent).
  Planner: author `\label`+`\lean`+`\uses` block. Same status as untracked `unit_assemble`,
  `hcore_assemble`, `leftAdjointUniq_hom_app_homEquiv_symm` (already `% NOTE`-flagged).

## Blueprint cleanup (MAJOR from reviewers ‚ÄĒ non-blocking, do before/with next chapter writer round)
- **L2 prose‚ÜĒproof divergence** (`lem:presheaf_pullback_unit_iso_sheafify_reconcile`): proof prose +
  both `\uses` sets are STALE. `% NOTE:` placed this iter. Realized route is transpose-free
  (‚Ä†)-factorisation via `H1inv_app_eq_pullbackVal_restrict` + RES1 + `adj_unit_counit_collapse`;
  prose lists unused `sheaf_pullback_unit_forget_eq`/`leftadjointuniq_app_unit_eta_general`/
  `unit_leftadjointuniq_hom_app`. Dispatch blueprint-writer to rewrite prose + realign `\uses`.
- **3 stale Lean comments (auditor MAJOR)** ‚ÄĒ comment-only, the planner should note for a cleanup pass
  (provers can fix when next in-file): `TensorObjInverse.lean` L1146 (cites now-closed
  `dual_restrict_iso_restrict_compat` "sorry below", now L1484 sorry-free); L804
  (`sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq` called a "single reduced residual", proven); L2397‚Äď2398 (L2/L3 "their
  own residual sorries", both closed).

## Reusable proof patterns (added to Knowledge Base)
- Generic adjunction unit/counit collapse via `homEquiv` round-trip (beats keyed-rw naturality, dodges
  `L‚čôR` middle-object mismatch; `homEquiv_unit`/`homEquiv_counit` take args EXPLICITLY here).
- Term-mode `congrArg (g ‚Čę ¬∑) lemma` to cross the `SheafOfModules ‚Čę` seam (keyed rw misses composite).
- `(H1.app ūĚüô).inv ‚Üí H1.inv.app ūĚüô` via `Iso.app_inv`; avoid `‚Üź Functor.map_comp` (instances type
  error), split RHS by forward `Functor.map_comp`.

## Do NOT
- Do NOT re-prove the RES2 chain / keystone (a) ‚ÄĒ done, axiom-clean.
- Do NOT dispatch (c) as a single `prove` lane without first atomizing the 5-square telescope
  + `j`-naturality requirement at the blueprint level (HARD GATE).
